requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety — Refrigerator Safety under NTP IEC 60335-2-24
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全——基于NTP IEC 60335-2-24的冰箱安全
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全——基於NTP IEC 60335-2-24的冰箱安全

summary.en: For imported household refrigerators, Peru references INACAL-adopted NTP standards aligned with IEC 60335-2-24 and related household appliance safety provisions. INDECOPI and PRODUCE apply the relevant Reglamento Tecnico only where issued. Common requirements include insulation resistance, earth continuity, thermal cutout, enclosure strength, electrical marking, and safe use instructions for the intended supply and usage conditions.
summary.zh: 对于进口家用冰箱，秘鲁采用INACAL采纳的基于IEC 60335-2-24的NTP标准及相关家用电器安全条款。INDECOPI与PRODUCE按是否有技术规章要求执行相应规定。常见要求包括绝缘电阻、接地连续性、热断路器、外壳强度、产品标识以及按使用环境给出的安全说明。
summary.zht: 對於進口家用冰箱，秘魯採用INACAL採納的基於IEC 60335-2-24的NTP標準及相關家用電器安全條款。INDECOPI與PRODUCE按是否有技術規章要求執行相應規定。常見要求包括絕緣電阻、接地連續性、熱斷路器、外殼強度、產品標識以及按使用環境給出的安全說明。

standards_or_laws: INACAL NTP equivalent of IEC 60335-2-24, applied through the relevant Reglamento Tecnico for refrigeration appliances
INACAL NTP IEC 60335-1 (general household appliance safety structure)
PRODUCE / INDECOPI market framework for mandatory technical regulations (Reglamentos Tecnicos)

summary.en: China applies mandatory GB 4706.13-2014 (household and similar electrical appliances) plus GB 4706.1 as the base safety regime for domestic sale, enforced through CCC certification by SAMR/CNCA. China uses IEC lineage but maintains market-specific deviations and domestic test obligations. CNCA test/CCC records are not automatic equivalents for Peru technical regulation clearance.
summary.zh: 中国对国内销售实行GB 4706.13-2014（家用和类似用途电器）及GB 4706.1为基础安全制度，并由SAMR/CNCA通过CCC监督执行。中国采用IEC技术基础，但有本国偏差和国内测试义务。CNCA检测与CCC记录不能自动视为秘鲁技术规章清关的替代文件。
summary.zht: 中國對國內銷售執行GB 4706.13-2014（家用和類似用途電器）及GB 4706.1為基礎安全制度，並由SAMR/CNCA通過CCC監督執行。中國採用IEC技術基礎，但有本國偏差和國內測試義務。CNCA檢測與CCC記錄不能自動視為秘魯技術規章清關的替代文件。

standards_or_laws: GB 4706.13-2014 — Safety of household and similar electrical appliances — Particular requirements
GB 4706.1-2005 — General requirements for household and similar electrical appliances

gap.en: The exporter should expect Peru-focused conformity evidence in the export file set because domestic CCC dossiers are prepared for the China market. Where a Peru Reglamento Tecnico applies to refrigerators, Chinese test reports and manuals may need technical mapping and sometimes re-evaluation of electrical markings, nameplate data, and installation context under Peru importer-led clearance.
gap.zh: 出口商应预期需提交以秘鲁市场为导向的合规材料，因为CCC文件是为中国市场准备。若秘鲁对该类冰箱实行技术规章，则中国检测报告和说明书可能需要技术对照并在某些情况下重审铭牌数据、铭牌标识与安装环境，且与秘鲁进口商主导的放行程序衔接。
gap.zht: 出口商應預期需提交以秘魯市場為導向的合規材料，因為CCC文件是為中國市場準備。若秘魯對該類冰箱實行技術規章，則中國檢測報告和說明書可能需要技術對照並在某些情況下重審銘牌資料、標識與安裝環境，且與秘魯進口商主導的放行程序銜接。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where a relevant refrigerator Reglamento Tecnico applies; conformity evidence and importer-led clearance required before Peru market placement
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory in China under GB 4706.13-2014 and related CCC rules for domestic sale; mandatory context differs from Peru import clearance

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Domestic China CCC safety compliance is not enough on its own for Peru import placement. Exporters should map refrigerator documentation to Peru's applicable INACAL NTP-based requirements and the responsible importer should provide Peru-accepted conformity evidence under the relevant Reglamento Tecnico.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国CCC电器安全合规不能单独满足秘鲁进口放行要求。出口商应将冰箱文件按秘鲁适用INACAL NTP要求映射，并由负责进口商在相关技术规章下提交秘鲁认可的符合性证据。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國CCC電器安全合規不能單獨滿足秘魯進口放行要求。出口商應將冰箱文件按秘魯適用INACAL NTP要求映射，並由負責進口商在相關技術規章下提交秘魯認可的符合性證據。
